title: eleocharis tenuis var. atrata
intro: Eleocharis tenuis var. atrata, also known as black spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis tenuis var. atrata include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant, which are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
